videos.title: FP3 Highlights | 2026 Australian Grand Prix
videos.description:
With the third and final practice session complete, the drivers and teams now look to Qualifying for the Australian Grand Prix. Catch up on all the action from a disrupted FP3, which saw a big crash late on in the session.
